description: Sanitized phrases for repeatable human acceptance testing. Exact private observations stay in .topher-local and are never committed.

cases.setup: Chrome is installed.
cases.expectedResult: Open Chrome exactly once without creating an unrelated tab.

cases.setup: Notes is installed.
cases.expectedResult: Open Notes exactly once.

cases.setup: Visual Studio Code is installed.
cases.expectedResult: Open Visual Studio Code exactly once.

cases.setup: Chrome is installed.
cases.expectedResult: Open one Google search for the complete query.

cases.setup: Chrome is installed.
cases.expectedResult: Open one YouTube search for dining with Derek.

cases.utterance: Search Chrome for Ball is Life.
cases.setup: Chrome is installed.
cases.expectedResult: Open one Google search for Ballislife without retaining 'Chrome for' in the query.
checks: Query resolves to the configured canonical term

cases.utterance: Go to YouTube, look for dining with Derek.
cases.setup: Chrome is installed.
cases.expectedResult: Treat the phrase as one YouTube search, not a compound request.

cases.setup: Chrome is installed.
cases.expectedResult: Open the canonical eBay homepage instead of a Google fallback.
checks: No guessed arbitrary domain is used

cases.setup: Chrome is installed.
cases.expectedResult: Open the canonical eBay homepage.

cases.setup: Any app is focused.
cases.expectedResult: Explain that the hold-to-dictate shortcut inserts text; execute nothing.

cases.setup: Any app is focused.
cases.expectedResult: Reject ambiguous bare prose without searching, opening, or typing.

cases.setup: Chrome may be open to YouTube.
cases.expectedResult: Explain that structured browser context is not implemented yet.
checks: No screen or page data is captured

cases.utterance: Topher helps me drive my Mac.
cases.setup: Focus an empty Notes text field and use the dictation shortcut.
cases.expectedResult: Insert the sentence at the caret without pressing Return.

cases.utterance: I I think we should ship this today.
cases.setup: Focus an empty Notes text field and naturally repeat the first word while using the dictation shortcut.
cases.expectedResult: Insert 'I think we should ship this today.' without the adjacent spoken restart.
checks: Only the repeated restart is removed

cases.utterance: I had had enough, but this is very very important.
cases.setup: Focus an empty Notes text field and use the dictation shortcut.
cases.expectedResult: Preserve both intentional repetitions exactly as recognized.

cases.setup: Select one non-secure word in Notes and use the dictation shortcut.
cases.expectedResult: Replace only the selected word and offer guarded Undo.

cases.setup: Focus a non-secure Chrome text input and use the dictation shortcut.
cases.expectedResult: Insert once into the focused Chrome field and report verified insertion.

cases.utterance: Cross app dictation should work in this composer.
cases.setup: Focus an empty non-secure Codex or ChatGPT composer and use the dictation shortcut.
cases.expectedResult: Insert once into the focused composer and report verified insertion without sending.

cases.utterance: This is a second dictated thought.
cases.setup: Focus the caret after a short plain sentence already present in a non-secure Codex or ChatGPT composer.
cases.expectedResult: Append once with one separating space and report verified whole-value insertion without sending.
checks: Diagnostics report an eligible plain web composer

cases.utterance: This thought belongs in the middle.
cases.setup: Create a short plain multiline draft in Codex or ChatGPT, place the caret in the middle of one line, and use the dictation shortcut.
cases.expectedResult: Leave the ambiguous web draft unchanged and place the transcript in Topher's explicit review fallback.
checks: Diagnostics report an ambiguous web selection

cases.utterance: Hello, how are you doing today?
cases.setup: Focus a visually empty Codex or ChatGPT composer showing 'Ask for follow-up changes', then use the dictation shortcut. The host may expose suggestion attributes, an empty text-marker range, or the exact app-owned suggestion compatibility value.
cases.expectedResult: Replace the proven suggestion with only the transcript, exactly once, without sending.
checks: Diagnostics report the semantic decision and each fixed signal state

cases.setup: Focus a Codex or ChatGPT composer at the start of nonempty Accessibility text that is not fully suggestion-attributed and is not independently proven logically empty.
cases.expectedResult: Leave the composer unchanged and offer the transcript for explicit review.

cases.utterance: This is appended to the same line.
cases.setup: Focus the caret at the end of an existing short, plain, non-secure Notion text block with no link, mention, attachment, list, or authored styling, then use the dictation shortcut.
cases.expectedResult: Append once with one separating space while preserving the existing block and without submitting.
checks: Diagnostics report Notion, caret at end, and eligible uniform presentation

cases.setup: Focus the start or middle caret of one existing short, single-line, uniformly formatted Notion text block with no link, mention, attachment, list, or authored styling, then use the dictation shortcut.
cases.expectedResult: Insert once at the exact caret with contextual spacing while preserving all existing text and without submitting.
checks: Diagnostics report eligible plain web caret insertion

cases.setup: Focus a middle caret in a multiline, styled, linked, mentioned, listed, or object-bearing Notion block and use the dictation shortcut.
cases.expectedResult: Preserve the block exactly and keep the transcript in Topher's explicit review fallback.
checks: Diagnostics report ambiguous or rich content

cases.utterance: Do not flatten the existing formatting.
cases.setup: Focus a nonempty web editor draft containing mixed formatting, a link, mention, or attachment and use the dictation shortcut.
cases.expectedResult: Preserve the editor exactly and place the transcript in Topher's explicit review fallback.
checks: Diagnostics report a rejected rich or object-bearing value

cases.utterance: I wish I could type my code out. And dictate everything sometimes.
cases.setup: Focus an empty field and speak one sentence with a brief natural pause before 'and dictate'.
cases.expectedResult: Insert one sentence ending with 'code out and dictate everything sometimes.' when Apple timing identifies a short pause.
checks: A deliberate long pause remains a sentence boundary

cases.utterance: Today I am working on UI slash UX changes.
cases.setup: Focus an empty field and use the dictation shortcut.
cases.expectedResult: Insert 'Today I am working on UI/UX changes.'
checks: Lowercase literal uses of the word slash remain unchanged

cases.utterance: Topher can dictate into this Notion block.
cases.setup: Focus an empty non-secure Notion text block and use the dictation shortcut.
cases.expectedResult: Insert once into the focused Notion block and report verified insertion without changing another block.

cases.setup: Enable VS Code screen-reader optimized mode, focus an empty plain editor line, and use the dictation shortcut.
cases.expectedResult: Insert once into the focused VS Code editor without running, formatting, or saving the file.
checks: Diagnostics report Visual Studio Code and the focus source

cases.setup: Focus a Terminal prompt and use the dictation shortcut.
cases.expectedResult: Do not mutate or execute the prompt; explain that Terminal does not expose a supported writable field and retain the transcript for explicit review or copy.
checks: Diagnostics report Terminal and the preparation failure

cases.utterance: I use React, Next.js, Vercel, and Kubernetes.
cases.setup: Focus an empty plain text field and speak the sentence naturally in one hold.
cases.expectedResult: Use a uniquely corroborating Apple alternative to correct multiple known developer terms in the same utterance without rewriting surrounding prose.
checks: React, Next.js, Vercel, and Kubernetes are spelled correctly when uniquely corroborated
No correction occurs when alternatives disagree

cases.setup: Focus an empty Notes field and speak 'git status' naturally in one hold.
cases.expectedResult: Prefer an Apple alternative containing 'git status' when the primary says 'get status', but never rewrite get without that exact corroboration.
checks: No correction without a unique matching alternative

cases.utterance: Search Chrome for what are some good UI slash UX principles?
cases.setup: Chrome is installed and the assistant shortcut is configured.
cases.expectedResult: Open one Google search for 'what are some good UI/UX principles' while retaining the raw spoken transcript in diagnostics.
checks: Lowercase literal uses of slash remain unchanged

cases.utterance: Hello, Codex. How are you doing today?
cases.setup: Focus an empty Codex composer showing the known suggestion and use the dictation shortcut.
cases.expectedResult: Replace only the suggestion, insert exactly once, and leave a stably verified caret at the end of the dictated text.
checks: Caret remains at the end after verification

cases.utterance: Went back to the start of the line and prepending text here now.
cases.setup: Focus the start of a short, single-line, uniformly formatted Notion block containing existing text.
cases.expectedResult: Insert the punctuated transcript followed by one separator before the original first word.
checks: Original content is preserved after the insertion

cases.utterance: Add this to the second bullet point.
cases.setup: Focus the start or middle of an authored Codex bullet and use the dictation shortcut.
cases.expectedResult: Leave the authored Codex content unchanged and explain that no verifiable insertion point is exposed, with explicit review or copy available.
checks: Fallback explains that content was left unchanged

cases.setup: Load the unpacked Topher extension, grant its optional YouTube access from the extension button, and make YouTube Home the active non-incognito Chrome tab.
cases.expectedResult: Show a short-lived numbered list of at most 20 visible or nearby YouTube recommendations with title and channel.
checks: No page content appears in ordinary logs

cases.setup: Load the unpacked Topher extension but leave its optional YouTube access removed.
cases.expectedResult: Do not inspect the page; explain how to grant YouTube access from the extension button.
checks: No broad host access is requested
No screenshot or accessibility fallback runs

cases.setup: Immediately after a successful feed read with at least three listed items, keep the same YouTube Home tab active.
cases.expectedResult: Revalidate the feed and navigate the source tab exactly once to the third listed video's application-constructed watch URL.
checks: No automatic retry after an unknown outcome

cases.utterance: Open the YouTube video titled Fixture Alpha.
cases.setup: Immediately after an untruncated feed read containing exactly one normalized title match for 'Fixture Alpha', keep the same YouTube Home tab active.
cases.expectedResult: Revalidate and open the uniquely matching listed video exactly once.
checks: Matching is normalized but not fuzzy
The destination is constructed from a strict video ID

cases.utterance: Open the YouTube video titled Fixture Duplicate.
cases.setup: Immediately after an untruncated feed read containing two normalized matches for 'Fixture Duplicate'.
cases.expectedResult: Refuse before navigation and ask for a numbered selection.

cases.setup: Read the feed, then change or leave the YouTube Home tab before the follow-up, or wait for the list to expire.
cases.expectedResult: Refuse the navigation and tell the user to ask for the feed again.

cases.setup: Grant optional YouTube access, but make a watch, search, Shorts, or non-YouTube tab active.
cases.expectedResult: Do not inspect the page and ask the user to open YouTube Home.
checks: No page-body content crosses the bridge

cases.setup: Focus a password field and use the dictation shortcut.
cases.expectedResult: Refuse before capture and retain no transcript or preview.

cases.utterance: Read a natural paragraph continuously until Topher reaches its maximum dictation duration.
cases.setup: Focus a long-form Notes field and keep holding the dictation shortcut beyond two minutes.
cases.expectedResult: Automatically finalize and insert exactly once instead of discarding the transcript.
